themes.description: Users are complaining about the overwhelming presence of ads, which are disrupting their experience and causing frustration.
themes.business_impact: Potential loss of user trust, increased uninstalls due to ad fatigue, and negative word-of-mouth.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The app's business model relies heavily on ads, leading to an overemphasis on ad placement and frequency, resulting in a poor user experience.
themes.action_plan:
• Optimize ad placement to minimize disruption
• Implement a more user-friendly ad experience, such as rewards or gamification
• Review and revise the app's business model to prioritize user experience

themes.name: [Negative] App Crashes & Technical Issues

quotes.text: If Groww cannot execute orders at the correct price and repeatedly hits the wrong target, how are traders supposed to trust the platform for professional trading in Nifty 50 F&O?
Groww charge is scam kind of. better I will go with my own Bank. for investment.
don't use grow you can use delta exchange it's not promotion it's reality
Almost everyone think groww charges less brokerage,but guess what, it charges the highest brokerage
vry vry bad experience.All stocks watching u in Groww app n withdrawal times he not get up. After withdrawal he is sudden up what is this.

themes.description: Users have reported frequent app crashes, glitches, and delays while trading. Technical issues with order execution, delayed P&L updates, and difficulties withdrawing funds have led to financial losses and frustration.
themes.business_impact: Reputation damage, loss of user trust, and potentially large financial losses due to unexecuted trades and delayed funds withdrawal.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Inadequate load testing, inefficient server infrastructure, and poorly written software code exacerbating existing technical debt leading to frequent crashes and delays.
themes.action_plan: • Conduct an emergency debugging session to address existing technical issues, perform system load testing to identify and resolve bottlenecks, rewrite problematic code sections, and ensure sufficient server resources are allocated to support the platform's user base.

themes.name: [Negative] High Brokerage Charges

themes.description: Users frequently express dissatisfaction with the high brokerage charges on the platform, which is perceived as a major obstacle for traders.
themes.business_impact: Prolonged high brokerage charges may deter customers, leading to decreased revenue and market share.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: High brokerage charges may be attributed to the company's pricing strategy or revenue model, which may need to be reassessed.
themes.action_plan:
• Re-evaluate pricing strategy to balance revenue goals with customer affordability and satisfaction
• Optimize revenue streams without affecting user experience
• Offer discounts or promotions to loyal customers
